6-Week Guided Programme · May 2026

You are not struggling
to conceive.
Your body is struggling
to feel safe enough to receive.

A 6-week guided journey to regulate your nervous system, restore your body, and prepare you physically, emotionally, and energetically for conception.

You have done everything right. And yet something still is not happening. Because this is not just about your body. It is about the state your body is in.

Apply for the May Cohort →

Short application + private call · Limited spots

The truth no one tells you

Your body does not
open under pressure.
It closes.

The more you track, try, push, and worry -- the more your system moves into survival. And survival is not where life begins.

This is why you can be doing everything right and still not conceive.

Modern science shows

Your reproductive system is deeply connected to your nervous system, stress response, and hormonal balance.

Ancient wisdom has always known

The body must feel safe enough to shift out of protection and into creation.

The Conscious Conception Method

Three layers your body must
move through to be ready to receive.

Most fertility support works on one layer. This works on all three -- because that is the only way the shift becomes permanent.

01

Regulate

We bring your body out of survival mode. Through breathwork, nervous system tools, and daily practices -- your system begins to slow down and feel safe.

02

Restore

We rebuild your foundation. Simple, personalised shifts in nourishment, lifestyle, and hormonal support to help your body stabilise and function optimally.

03

Receive

We work with what is deeper. Emotional patterns, subconscious beliefs, and internal resistance -- so your body can open, not protect.

This is not about doing more. It is about creating the conditions where your body can finally respond.

Inside the programme

Designed to simplify
your journey --
not complicate it.

  • Weekly live coaching and teaching sessions
  • Guided breathwork and nervous system practices
  • Personalised support and integration
  • Practical protocols you can actually follow
  • Subconscious reprogramming, journaling, chanting
  • Womb healing -- physical and emotional
  • A space that holds you -- not overwhelms you
  • Lifetime access to all recordings and materials
Who this is for

You have been trying.
Now prepare differently.

  • You have been trying for months or years without clarity
  • You feel something deeper is blocking your body
  • You are tired of guessing and trying everything
  • You are ready to approach this holistically
  • You want real preparation -- not just information

This is not for you if:You are looking for a quick fix, you are not open to internal work, or you want surface-level solutions.

Questions you may be holding

Before you decide.

Most women who come here have. This is simply a different layer -- one that most fertility support never reaches. The nervous system and subconscious body are not addressed in conventional approaches.

Yes. This work complements medical support by addressing the nervous system and deeper emotional layers that are often missed. Many women find it changes both the experience and the outcome.

You do not need certainty. You only need willingness. Clarity does not come before the journey -- it comes through it.

Your support continues. We shift into mindful pregnancy guidance, Garbha Sanskar practices, and birth preparation as you approach your third trimester. You are supported throughout the entire journey.

Yes. Payment plans are available on request. Mention it when you apply and we will discuss what works for your situation.
